UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2021 FOR HEARING ON THE PETITION TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR, NAHLIYAH FAYTH VITO - DENIED. THE COURT SHALL NOT CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR WITHOUT THE CONSENT OF BOTH PARENTS. NAHWAL VITO, MOTHER OF THE MINOR NAHLIYAH FAYTH VITO, WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY PETITIONER KEITH BASS. THE COURT REVIEWED THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF NAHWAL VITO IN OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION TO CHANGE THE MINOR'S NAME. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY ERIC THRONE, CSR #7855. EMAIL: ERIC.THRONE.CSR@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT VITO, NAHWAL SERVED MAR-08-2021, MAIL AS TO PETITIONER BASS, KEITH

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF APR-13-2021 FOR HEARING ON THE CONTESTED NAME CHANGE OF THE MINOR, NAHLIYAH FAYTH VITO - CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2021 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 FOR FURTHER HEARING ON THE PETITION FOR NAME CHANGE. PETITIONER KEITH BASS WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NAHWAL VITO, MOTHER OF NAHLIYAH FAYTH VITO, WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. THE COURT INSTRUCTS MS. VITO TO SUBMIT A DECLARATION RE: THE ROLE PETITIONER KEITH BASS HAS PLAYED IN THE CHILD'S LIFE. MR. BASS IS INVITED TO SUBMIT A FURTHER DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF HIS REQUEST, IF HE SO CHOOSES. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY DENISE WILSON EASTMAN, CSR #8557. EMAIL: DWILSONEASTMAN@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
